expert_rss.title: North Korean Congress Codifies New Nuclear Policy
expert_rss.summary: Executive Summary: The Ninth Congress of the Workers’ Party of Korea (WPK) in Pyongyang, held from February 19–25, institutionalized the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea (DPRK) as a permanent nuclear weapons state. This marks a definitive end to the 2013 economy–nuclear “byungjin,” or parallel development, which called for promoting nuclearization and economic development in tandem, […]

expert_rss.title: Orbán’s Rule Could End Despite Russian Interference
expert_rss.summary: Executive Summary: Hungary’s April 12 parliamentary elections will be its most competitive in 16 years. Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán’s nationalist Fidesz–Christian Democratic People’s Party (KDNP) alliance is facing its toughest challenge yet, posed by Péter Magyar’s pro-EU Respect and Freedom Party (Tisza). In every other election since 2010, only the extent of Fidesz’s victory […]

expert_rss.title: Naval Postgraduate School Alumni Lead Artemis II Homebound
expert_rss.summary: Retired Navy Capt. Reid Wiseman and Navy Capt. Victor Glover — Naval Postgraduate School alumni — are using their years of experience as test pilots, advanced education and astronaut training to guide the Artemis II crew safely back to Earth.

expert_rss.summary: In a Pentagon press briefing, Air Force Gen. Dan Caine, chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, said that he and Secretary of War Pete Hegseth visited many of the warfighters involved in the missions to rescue two airmen downed by enemy forces in Iran, from the crew to the search and rescue forces.

wikipedia.notes: A man rammed a truck into a synagogue and died in a shootout by police. The incident is being investigated as an act of terrorism.
A man opened fire in an ROTC class at Dominion University killing 1 and wounding 2 other. The suspect was killed by students at the school.
Three suspected suicide bombings were carried out at three locations in Maiduguri, Borno State, Nigeria. The bombings occurred during a yearslong peaceful stretch in the city.
Several perpetrators opened fire near the Israeli consulate building, Turkish police neutralized the attackers.
